abilities.name: Follow My Tune
abilities.text: When this model activates, any number of friendly Malifaux Rats in play may declare the Walk action.

abilities.name: Nihilism
abilities.text: When this model would gain a token, it may discard a card instead.

abilities.name: "Protect Me, Lovelies"
abilities.text: When this model is dealt damage, it may drain a (soulstone) to reduce the damage by an amount equal to the number of friendly Malifaux Rats within 6" (maximum 4).

actions.name: Haunting Pipes
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This action cannot target the same model more than once per activation. This action may target friendly models.
actions.effects: Target declares an action chosen and controlled by this model. If this action receives a raise, the target gains an Aura (Hazardous) token.

triggers.name: Taint
triggers.text: The target gains a Blight token.

actions.name: A Dance of Tiny Feet
actions.costs_and_restrictions: This attack has a raise value of 3.
actions.effects: For each raise this attack receives, summon a Malifaux Rat into base contact with the target.

triggers.name: Gnawed Ankle
triggers.text: Kill a friendly vermin model within 3" of the target. Move the target 6".

triggers.name: Fever Bloom
triggers.text: Remove a Blight token from the target. The target is dealt 1 damage and gains a Stunned token.

actions.name: A Song for the Sewers
actions.effects: Summon a Malifaux Rat within range. For each raise this action receives, summon one additional Malifaux Rat within range.

triggers.name: Scamper
triggers.text: The summoned models declare the Walk action.

actions.name: Piper's Dance
actions.effects: Friendly models within range move up to 3".
